### 15. Conformance

#### 15.2 Conformance criteria

1. The ecosystem can express all required annotation groups.
2. Pattern rule detection is enforced where applicable.
3. Structural verification is enforced where its preconditions apply.
4. Taint-flow tracking traces declared flows.
5. Precision and recall are measured, tracked, and published per measurement cell.
6. A golden corpus of labelled specimens exists and is maintained.
